name: JSF++: Static Analysis Before Commit
description: Source is checked against the JSF++ ruleset by static analysis before it is committed.
rationale: JSF++ enforcement: rule compliance is established by analysis (and manual review for unverifiable rules) before code is accepted.
source: JSF Air Vehicle C++ Coding Standards (Lockheed Martin, Doc. 2RDU00001 Rev C, Dec 2005). https://www.stroustrup.com/JSF-AV-rules.pdf
